headline: Health Care and Industrials lead a highly constructive market expansion, while Real Estate and Utilities face notable relative weakness.
breadth_commentary: Overall market health remains robust across our 850-ticker universe, with 1,120 tickers classified in the expansion phase compared to 450 in drawdown and only 1 in compression. Sector-level displacement breadth is heavily skewed to the upside, led by Health Care with a 19.1% bullish expansion rate against just 1.5% bearish, and Consumer Discretionary showing 10.3% bullish versus 4.2% bearish expansion.
sector_leadership: Health Care exhibits dominant leadership, with the Pharmaceuticals sub-sector hitting 52-week highs and scoring a high RRG combined score of 95.1, supported by strong sub-sector conviction in Industrial Products (77.9%) and Telecom Equipment (77.7%). Financial Technology (96.2 score) and Water Supply & Management (95.1 score) are also rotating in with powerful 4-week momentum. Real Estate Development shows a divergent picture, leading theme conviction at 75.18% via momentum driver ELPROINTL.BO, despite broader sub-sector RRG weakness.
sector_laggards: Real Estate Development is the primary laggard on a relative basis, posting a sharp 4-week momentum decline of -12.69% and a weak RRG score of 19.8. Other notable areas of rotation out or weakness include TV Broadcasting & Software Pro (-8.29% 4-week momentum) and Heavy Electrical Equipment (-7.16% 4-week momentum).
notable_setups: In our focus list, GRANULES.NS (0.863 score) and ADANIENSOL.NS (0.828 score) show explosive setups, while ASTERDM.NS and OFSS.NS show high-conviction gradual trends. On the breakout front, JUSTDIAL.NS and KALYANKJIL.NS are showing massive positive displacement (Z-scores of 5.59 and 3.88 respectively) as they break through 26-week ceilings. For new campaigns emerging from drawdowns, NDRAUTO.NS (4.12% drawdown magnitude) and RRKABEL.NS (15.87% drawdown magnitude) are key setups to monitor.
levels_to_watch: Key structural breaks to the upside are occurring at 52-week ceilings for FILATEX.NS and KABRAEXTRU.NS, while critical structural breakdowns below 52-week floors are visible in PATANJALI.NS, KPITTECH.NS, and TATAELXSI.NS.
